pet_notes: original tiny 2D flat-vector wearable AI companion robot named Sprout, rounded mint-green capsule head, one short centered antenna with dot tip, dark navy oval eyes and tiny rounded-line mouth, subtle dark base, clean simple silhouette, calm friendly expression, no text, no logo
style_notes: crisp original flat 2D mascot, mint shell #7bf2bf, dark navy facial features #101722, one short antenna, simple closed shapes, readable at 128x139, no gradients, no text, no logo, no third-party character resemblance
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `flat-vector`: Flat vector-style mascot with simple geometric forms, crisp color areas, clean outline, and minimal shading. User style notes: crisp original flat 2D mascot, mint shell #7bf2bf, dark navy facial features #101722, one short antenna, simple closed shapes, readable at 128x139, no gradients, no text, no logo, no third-party character resemblance.
brand_brief: Sprout 是 WatchBuddy 的原创腕上 AI 伙伴：薄荷绿圆润机器人、深海军蓝五官、单根短天线，以安静、温暖、可轻点回应的低频互动陪伴用户。
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
